entity.label: Levi
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: The father of Matthat, and son of Simeon, of the ancestors of Christ (Luke 3:29).

nodes.label: Levi
nodes.description: The father of Matthat, and son of Simeon, of the ancestors of Christ (Luke 3:29).

nodes.label: Simeon
nodes.description: One of the ancestors of Joseph (Luke 3:30).

verses.text: Which was the son of Jose, which was the son of Eliezer, which was the son of Jorim, which was the son of Matthat, which was the son of Levi,
